bridge.description: The command center of the ship. Two captain's chairs face a wide viewport while consoles blink softly.

captains_chairs.description: Two worn chairs, side by side.

viewport.description: A curved window showing slow-moving stars.

engineering.description: The heart of the ship. The warp core hums behind diagnostic panels and organized tools.

warp_core.description: A steady blue-white column of contained energy.

workbench.description: A sturdy bench with sorted tools.

ready_room.description: A quiet room for planning, reflection, and difficult conversations.

desk.description: A simple desk with a clean surface.

science.description: A compact lab full of displays, star charts, and half-finished analyses.

holodeck.description: A dark grid room that can become almost anything.

arch.description: The control arch glows faintly at the edge of the room.

medbay.description: Clean, warm, and quiet. Diagnostic beds and soft lights make the space feel steadier than sterile.

biobed.description: A diagnostic bed with standby readings.

rec.description: A lived-in lounge with a bar, couches, a viewport, and a game table.

bar.description: The bar is polished and stocked with mysterious bottles.

game_table.description: A table suitable for chess, cards, darts scoring, or arguments about rules.

messhall.description: A communal room with long tables, a small galley, and enough room for the whole crew.

galley.description: A compact food station with replicator controls.

quarters.description: Crew quarters line a quiet corridor. Each cabin is private unless invited in.

cabin_doors.description: A row of cabin doors with dim nameplates.

captains.description: A small captain's quarters with a viewport, a shared desk, and room to breathe.

observatory.description: A quiet observation deck with astronomy instruments and a wide field of stars.

telescope_console.description: A console for sky objects and charts.
